case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LIONEL H HILL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-13-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
